title: Buchnera simplex

The classification of Buchnera simplex is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Boraginales, Family: Boraginaceae, Genus: Buchnera, Species: B. simplex.
